g.data-semantic-attributes: latex:\begin{equation} \begin{aligned} \mathcal{L}(\bm{\theta}) &= \mathbb{E}_{\bm{x} \sim p_{\theta}(\bm{x})} \Bigg[ \sum_{i=1}^{N} \underbrace{ \norm{\bm{f}_{\theta}(\bm{x}_i) - \bm{y}_i}_2^2 }_{\textcolor{blue}{\text{Reconstruction Loss}}} \\ &\quad + \lambda \underbrace{ \int_{\Omega} \abs{\nabla \bm{f}_{\theta}(\bm{x})}^2 \, d\bm{x} }_{\textcolor{red}{\text{Smoothness Regularization}}} \\ &\quad + \gamma \underbrace{ \sum_{k=1}^{K} \mathbbm{1} \left( \bm{w}_k^\top \bm{x}_i > 0 \right) }_{\textcolor{purple}{\text{Activation Penalty}}} \Bigg] \end{aligned} \end{equation}
